digest.headline: Reddit community shows strong interest in premium espresso equipment while Flair launches standalone milk steamer

top_stories.title: Reddit analysis reveals top electric grinders for espresso based on 652 posts
top_stories.why_it_matters: Community-driven data shows consumer preferences for entry-level and premium grinder segments, valuable for Beanz's barista pack curation.

top_stories.title: Flair Espresso launches eWizard standalone milk steamer at $325
top_stories.why_it_matters: New product category could influence home barista equipment expectations and complement Beanz's FTBP offerings.

top_stories.title: Multiple Reddit users showcase high-end espresso machine purchases including Meticulous and Elisabeth models
top_stories.why_it_matters: Growing consumer appetite for premium equipment indicates opportunity for Beanz to target sophisticated home baristas with specialty roasts.

digest.competitor_watch: No direct competitor activity reported, though the premium equipment trend suggests opportunity for differentiation through curated coffee-equipment bundles.
digest.community_pulse: Reddit espresso community highly engaged with equipment upgrades and 'endgame' machine discussions, with users actively seeking one-and-done solutions and sharing latte art achievements.
recommended_actions: Consider partnership opportunities with trending equipment brands for FTBP bundles
Leverage Reddit grinder analysis data to refine equipment recommendations for subscribers
